# Run Agent

Lean role adapter for run/verification tasks.

Load in order:
- [context](../../docs/ai/context.md)
- [tester skill](../../docs/ai/skills/tester.md)
- [process rules](../../codex/process.md)

Use for startup, smoke checks, and environment validation.

## Typical commands

- `npm install`
- `npm run dev` and open `http://localhost:3000`
- `npm run lint`

If run/test workflow changes, update docs in the same task.
